text.value: The ImplementationGuide uses package ee.fhir.mpi#1.1.1 released on 2024-07-30, but the most recent appropriate version is 1.2.2. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered
A definition for CodeSystem 'https://fhir.ee/CodeSystem/tervisekontrolli-kasutusala' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated

The code 'Osaline' differs from the correct code 'osaline' by case. Although the code system 'https://fhir.ee/CodeSystem/toovoime-liik|0.2.2' is case insensitive, implementers are strongly encouraged to use the correct case anyway
